name: web-admin
description: Web Admin Dashboard — orchestrator for backend (Express) and frontend (React)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n "API,WEB" -c "cyan,green" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:fresh: npx kill-port 3001 5174 2>nul & concurrently -k -n "API,WEB" -c "cyan,green" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
